channel.title: Ways of Working on Ames World
channel.description: Recent content in Ways of Working on Ames World

item.title: Thoughts on Responding to Change
item.description: What does responding to change mean in different contexts?

item.title: So you're thinking of becoming a delivery manager
item.description: A mega post of advice about becoming a delivery manager

item.title: User Manual of Me
item.description: A user manual describing the conditions I like to work in, I use this format when starting new teams so everyone knows how everyone else likes to work and we can work out our ways of working to suit.

item.title: 10 Things I Learned From Remote Working
item.description: The most useful things I learnt in my first fully remote job.

item.title: Story Crowdsourcing Game
item.description: An icebreaker game I ran at Agile in the Ether, designed to demonstrate cognitive load.

item.title: Improving 'Find' for the Find Property Information Service
item.description: How my team identified an improved our address based search at HM Land Registry.

item.title: How Our Digital Team Works
item.description: An overview of my teams working practices at HM Land Registry.

item.title: 5 Reasons Open Plan Offices Suck for Agile Teams
item.description: A list of reasons why open plan offices are terrible for agile teams.

item.title: Are Sprints Sustainable?
item.description: Some reflections on the limitations of agile sprints.

item.title: The evolving visualisation of workflow in our team.
item.description: An overview of how our teams workflow evolved whilst at HM Land Registry.
